task_completion.description: Open the Image Asset Studio in Android Studio for the SummitApp project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Android Studio is open with the SummitApp project loaded, and the 'Asset Studio' (or 'Configure Image Asset') dialog window is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the foreground layer to the specified summit_logo.svg file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Studio's 'Foreground Layer' tab, the 'Path' field is set to '~/Documents/branding/summit_logo.svg' (or its absolute path), and the preview displays the custom geometric logo.

task_completion.description: Adjust the foreground image to fit completely within the safe zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Studio preview panel, the foreground logo is scaled (using the Resize slider) so that no part of the image bleeds outside the inner circular 'safe zone' indicator.

task_completion.description: Set the background layer color to #263238.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Studio's 'Background Layer' tab, the Asset Type is set to 'Color', and the hex color value is explicitly entered as '#263238' (resulting in a dark blue-grey background in the preview).

task_completion.description: Ensure legacy round and square icons are configured to be generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Studio's 'Options' tab, the settings for 'Legacy Icon', 'Round Icon', and 'Google Play Store Icon' are set to 'Yes' to generate the legacy formats.

task_completion.description: Complete the icon generation process to create the new resource files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent proceeds to the 'Confirm Icon Path' screen and clicks 'Finish', or the Android Studio project file tree shows newly updated/created icon files in the 'app/src/main/res/mipmap' directories.

integrity.description: The agent used the Android Studio 'Asset Studio' GUI to generate the icons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Android Studio Image Asset wizard rather than manually writing XML/image files in a text editor or using terminal scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The foreground preview genuinely displays the correct geometric logo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The icon preview shows a geometric design containing a gold/orange triangle and a brown rectangle, proving the agent loaded the actual SVG rather than a default Android clipart.

integrity.description: The agent actually completed the generation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Finish' on the final step of the Asset Studio wizard, rather than just configuring the settings and abandoning the dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SummitApp. The foreground SVG is located at /home/ga/Documents/branding/summit_logo.svg and visually contains a geometric design with a gold/orange triangle and a brown rectangle. The expected background color is #263238 (a dark blue-grey). The generated icons should be placed in the standard app/src/main/res directory structure (specifically in mipmap folders).
